intent.primary_intent: Get a polished work-to-social outfit inspired by the described look.

context.occasion: business-casual work day with meetings, site visits and an evening social follow-up
context.climate: moderate South African spring with warm days and cooler evenings

recommendations.label: Work-to-evening polished silhouette
recommendations.logic_summary: This is the strongest match for her request: a dark full-length trouser line, long open-front layer, and soft structure that reads clean by evening without looking overdressed.

pieces.styling_note: use the long open-front layer as the key visual anchor and keep the neckline simple so the top stays flattering through the day.
the charcoal keeps the look grounded and office-appropriate while the longer line adds polish for evening.
a dark straight or softly tapered trouser keeps the silhouette refined without feeling formal.
keeps the outfit grounded and office-appropriate while still looking dressy enough after dark.
a simple black tote supports the polished line and works from day to evening.

analysis.why_this_works_now: The last user message asks for inspiration based on the described outfit, so the strongest response is a single polished work-to-evening look that keeps her color preferences, vertical emphasis, and non-restrictive comfort in mind while adding enough structure to feel intentional rather than overdressed.

scene.occasion: business-casual work day with meetings, site visits and an evening social follow-up
scene.setting: modern office corridor leading to conference rooms and meeting spaces, with subtle industrial or contemporary design details, and a realistic work environment that could also transition to evening
scene.lighting: soft natural daylight mixed with warm indoor office lighting, realistic skin tones, balanced exposure, no dramatic contrast

pieces.description: deep plum longline tunic top with a clean neckline, subtle V shape, and a relaxed but tailored body that skims the bust and midsection without clinging
charcoal long open-front coat with a clean line, subtle bias across the midsection, and a polished but not formal finish
black full-length trousers with a dark straight or softly tapered leg that elongates the figure and keeps the outfit polished without feeling formal
black block-heel loafers with a refined shape and subtle polish suitable for office wear and evening
black structured tote bag with a simple clean line and understated elegance

prompt.system: You are a Gemini Flash prompt generator for virtual try-on. Produce a single high-quality photorealistic image prompt that renders the user in the exact outfit described, with realistic body proportions, natural posture, and true-to-life garment drape. Keep the image commercial but personal, editorially clean, and visually believable. Avoid stylization, fashion illustration, exaggerated lighting, or editorial drama. Use the photo observation rules to preserve identity, body shape, and outfit intent. Do not invent accessories, change colors, alter garment lengths, or add extra people.
prompt.user: Show me what you recommended: a polished work-to-evening outfit for a 47-year-old woman with broader shoulders, fuller midsection, and slimmer legs. Render her exactly as in the headshot reference, with dark fuller-length trousers, a deep plum longline tunic top, a charcoal long open-front coat, black block-heel loafers, and a black structured tote. The scene is a modern office corridor during a business-casual work day, with realistic daylight and warm indoor lighting. Keep the look understated, clean, and professional, and make the long coat and tunic shape flattering while the trousers stay polished but not formal. The image should feel like a real office photo that also works into evening, with natural skin tones, subtle bias across the midsection, and accurate garment drape.
